title: Intense Savory American Chicken Skillet
description: A hearty, post-workout American dish featuring tender chicken, savory yeast flavors, and a blend of spices, all cooked to perfection with a wok-hei twist and topped with Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 4 minutes.
Add the yeast extract and thyme to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, until the chicken is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
Stir in the Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese until melted and well combined.
Serve hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
